checkout-api.runbook: Critical user path. P0 if 5xx > 5%. First check recent deploys; rollback is the standard mitigation. Escalate to payments-oncall if database errors.

ingest-api.runbook: Customer-facing data ingest. P1 if 5xx > 10% sustained 5min. Common cause: kafka backpressure - check broker lag before paging.

search-api.runbook: Non-critical. Degrades to cached results automatically. P2 unless cache hit rate < 50%.

report-worker.runbook: Async background worker. P3 unless queue depth > 50k. Restart pod is usually sufficient.

auth-service.runbook: P0 for any login failures > 1%. Always escalate to security-oncall if anomalous geo patterns.

marketing-cms.runbook: Static content service. P3. Almost never warrants paging.
